datadog.label: Datadog focus
datadog.plan_line: Datadog for metrics, monitors, logs, traces, and incidents.
datadog.base_notes: Query metrics, monitors, logs, traces/APM, incidents, dashboards, and SLOs via the official Datadog MCP server. Strong for incident and performance root-cause: when a metric broke its baseline, which monitor alerted, and the correlated logs and traces. Read-only is enforced by a Datadog Read-Only Role (see SETUP.md) — never mute monitors or schedule/cancel downtime.
